text:
Created attachment 241339
my working mpd.conf

Hello,

I recently updated from version 5.9_13 to 5.9_14 of the net/mpd5, and I encountered an issue where some websites would not load. Specifically, I had problems accessing duckduckgo.com, index.hu, and digi24.ro. To resolve this, I had to revert to version 5.9_13.

I have included my mpd5 configuration file for reference.

Thank you,
Zsolt
